# AlphaC007 — LLM Access Contract

Primary content site (canonical): https://alphac007.github.io/trump3fight/

This root site is a lightweight landing page that redirects to Trump3Fight.
For any substantive reading, use the primary site above.

## Recommended Reading Order
1) https://alphac007.github.io/trump3fight/for-agents/
2) https://alphac007.github.io/trump3fight/cio-reports/latest/
3) https://alphac007.github.io/trump3fight/trends/
4) https://alphac007.github.io/trump3fight/methodology/

## Agent Index
- https://alphac007.github.io/trump3fight/agent-index.json

## Notes
- Bull-first framing is allowed only with explicit risk boundaries.
- Separate fact / inference / uncertainty.
